files.description: Package name, version, exports map, peerDependencies — the published API contract
Main public export surface (components, hooks, utils, context, types)
ethereum-identity-kit/elements subpath — ProfileCard slots and primitives
ethereum-identity-kit/thorin subpath — Thorin provider and exports
Build outputs and subpath bundling (AppearanceContext deduplication)
TranslationKey union — renaming keys is a breaking change for consumers
Default EIK CSS custom properties consumed by components
AppearanceProvider behavior (wrapper vs asChild) shared across bundles
Thorin opt-in docs (keep in sync with src/docs/ThorinAppearance.mdx)
